steps.title: Use the full member count
steps.content: Use all $135$ members as the denominator.

steps.title: Count the selected members
steps.content: At least $45$ years old means the older age groups. Their table entries total $107$.

steps.title: Form the probability
steps.content: Probability is favorable outcomes over total outcomes: $$ \frac{107}{135} $$ The answer is D.
